steps.screen:
[20CIt is written in the Book of Venus:

[24CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[24Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
[24CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
[24Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
[24Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
[24CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.

[20CYour goddess Venus seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
[20Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[20CYou, a newly trained Tenderfoot, have been heralded
[20Cfrom birth as the instrument of Venus.  You are destined
[20Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[20Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[20Cof us all:  Go bravely with Venus!
[20C--More--




Wizard the Tenderfoot[10CSt:14 Dx:11 Co:13 In:15 Wi:15 Ch:7 Neutral
Dlvl:1 $:0 HP:15(15) Pw:2(2) AC:0 Xp:1

Hello wizard, welcome to NetHack!  You are a neutral male human Ranger.
